prompt: Use the uploaded reference image as the exact identity reference. Preserve the same face shape, eyes, nose, lips, beard, haircut, age, skin texture, facial proportions, and overall masculine identity. Do not redesign the face. Create an ultra-realistic cinematic luxury portrait of the same man walking out of a private jet hangar at night. He wears a perfectly tailored black suit, white shirt, black tie, dark sunglasses, leather gloves, and an expensive watch. One hand holds a small black leather travel bag, the other adjusts his cuff. His expression is calm, rich, focused, and intimidating. Background: private jet partially visible behind him, wet concrete runway, soft fog, airport lights, luxury travel atmosphere. Lighting: strong white rim light from the jet, warm runy lights, cinematic contrast, realistic fabric texture, editorial luxury campaign style.
